note: Group-level manifest — one entry per asset folder/batch, not per file. Provenance reflects what's actually known from project history; nothing here is guessed.

groups.content: 8 hero portraits (Mage, Fighter, Swordman, Acolyte, Priestess, Archer, Summoner, Merchant) used in threejs-2_5d-clean-v5.html
groups.generator: external AI image tool (referred to by the user as "GPT") — images were generated outside this project and uploaded by the user into chat
groups.postprocess: Claude: flood-fill background/checkerboard removal, enclosed-pocket cleanup for fake-transparency artifacts, trim, face crop standardized to eyes-at-48%-height, aspect padding for cross-hero height consistency
groups.license: unknown — depends on the external tool's terms; not verified for this manifest

groups.content: 4 monster sprites (Slime, Wolf, Imp, Orc) used in threejs-2_5d-clean-v5.html
groups.generator: same external AI image tool as the hero portraits above
groups.postprocess: Claude: background removal (strict threshold for pale/grey subjects like Wolf, looser threshold + baked-shadow removal for Slime), trim, size-tier scaling in-game (Orc rendered 1.3x)

groups.content: painted top-down 8x8 arena texture used as the battle-scene ground in threejs-2_5d-clean-v5.html
groups.generator: same external AI image tool as the hero/monster art
groups.postprocess: Claude: edge-feathered with a canvas alpha gradient and blended into a tiled grass texture (cropped from a flat patch of the same image) so it reads seamlessly against the surrounding 3D scenery

groups.content: 5 synergy tag icons (Warrior, Ranger, Mage, Forest, Merchant)
groups.generator: tools/gen_class_icons.py — PIL ImageDraw vector shapes (line/arc/polygon), 4x supersampled then downscaled
groups.license: original work, no external assets involved

groups.path: assets/*.png (acolyte, archer, fighter, mage, merchant, novice, summoner, swordman, boss_champion*, mon_skeleton/stonewolf/spiritarcher/shadowassassin/golem/bonedragon, miniboss_warden, contact_sheet*.png)
groups.content: Map 1 job-class roster + monster/boss sprites used in game.html/heroes.html/forest-clearing.html
groups.license: original work, no external assets involved

groups.content: 8-frame animated sprite sheets for the 8 named heroes (Blade Master, Beast Lord, Trickster, Duelist, Archmage, Frost Weaver, Summoner, Sniper) used in heroes.html/autochess.html
groups.generator: tools/gen_heroes.py — palette-matched to user-uploaded reference character sheets
groups.reference_note: The 8 original reference character sheets these palettes were matched to were uploaded by the user directly into chat and were never committed to this repo (see ART_BRIEF.md) — only the generated pixel-art sheets exist here
groups.license: original work, no external assets involved

groups.content: flat-vector FF-style portrait cards for the 8 named heroes
groups.generator: tools/gen_portraits.py — supersampled vector shapes plus text set in Gloock (titles) and IBM Plex Mono (roles)
groups.fonts_source: /mnt/skills/examples/canvas-design/canvas-fonts (both are open-source Google Fonts families, SIL Open Font License)
groups.license: original work; embedded fonts are OFL-licensed

groups.content: Demo 1 Miniboss Pool members (Stage 5: orc_warlord alongside golem; Stage 10: lich_king alongside bone_dragon) and the fixed Stage 15 boss (arena_overlord), added when the Stage 5/10/15 boss policy was locked
groups.generator: tools/gen_bosses.py — new px()-based pixel-art blocks added alongside the existing miniboss/boss sprites; each uses a distinct palette/silhouette/weapon and does not reuse or derive from boss_champion*.png pixels
groups.provenance_note: arena_overlord is a dedicated new asset, not a renamed or recolored copy of the obsolete boss_champion/boss_champion_big sprites
groups.license: original work, no external assets involved

groups.generator: supplied directly by the user as JSON in chat
groups.license: project data, not a licensable asset
